title: Accounting
subtitle: Financial overview and accounting integrations
aging.title: Overdue Aging
topClients.title: Top Clients by Revenue
invoiceBreakdown.title: Invoice Breakdown
integrations.noSyncHistory: No sync history yet. Connect an accounting provider to get started.
integrations.outboundDesc: When you create or update invoices, estimates, or payments in OPS, they are automatically pushed to your connected accounting software.
integrations.inboundDesc: Changes made in QuickBooks or Sage are synced back to OPS via webhooks (QuickBooks) or periodic polling (Sage).
integrations.conflictsDesc: If both sides change the same record, OPS data takes priority by default. Conflicting changes are flagged for manual review.
integrations.quickbooksDesc: Sync invoices, estimates, payments, and customers with Intuit QuickBooks Online.
integrations.sageDesc: Sync invoices, quotes, payments, and contacts with Sage Business Cloud Accounting.
